modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't add notes in Coyote Connections, keeps logging me out.

full_description_text:  
So, I'm trying to add some notes during a visit in Coyote Connections, right? But every time I do, it just kicks me out and makes me log in again. I keep getting this weird error about HTTP Status 500 and something with SAML2 login response. It's super frustrating because I can't get my work done!
short_description: Can't add notes in Coyote Connections, keeps logging me out.
description: So, I'm trying to add some notes during a visit in Coyote Connections, right? But every time I do, it just kicks me out and makes me log in again. I keep getting this weird error about HTTP Status 500 and something with SAML2 login response. It's super frustrating because I can't get my work done!
